mapper.insert: INSERT INTO polygons (user_id, name, description, geom) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(#{geomJson}))
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, description, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_json, created_at, updated_at FROM polygons WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, name, description, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_json, created_at, updated_at FROM polygons WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM polygons WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
